top_signals.title: For Goldman’s Top Bankers, It’s All AI Data Centers All the Time
top_signals.summary: For leveraged finance practitioners, artificial intelligence is the only game in town — especially in the absence of more debt deals to finance mergers and acquisitions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg Money: Coming June 5th
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Each episode explores how people are making and spending money -- connecting the people and ideas shaping how we think about wealth. A smart, fast-paced hour that gives viewers the best tools to assess their financial futures. (Source: Bloomberg)
